faqs.question: How to open account?
faqs.answer: You need Aadhaar, PAN and address proof. Visit nearest branch or use Capital Bank mobile app.

faqs.question: What documents are required for a savings account?
faqs.answer: You need: Aadhaar card, PAN card, 2 passport-size photos, and address proof (utility bill or rental agreement).

faqs.question: How long does it take to open an account?
faqs.answer: Online account opening takes 24-48 hours. In-branch opening is completed the same day if all documents are in order.

faqs.question: What is the minimum balance for a savings account?
faqs.answer: The minimum average monthly balance is ₹5,000 for urban branches and ₹2,000 for rural/semi-urban branches.

sections.name: UPI & Payments
sections.description: UPI limits, transfers, and payment services

faqs.question: What is the UPI daily transaction limit?
faqs.answer: The daily UPI limit is ₹1,00,000 across all UPI apps linked to your Capital Bank account.

faqs.question: How do I set up UPI on Capital Bank app?
faqs.answer: Open Capital Bank app → UPI → Register → Link your account → Set UPI PIN using debit card details.

faqs.question: What is the NEFT/RTGS transfer limit?
faqs.answer: NEFT: No upper limit (minimum ₹1). RTGS: Minimum ₹2,00,000, no upper cap. Both are available 24x7.

faqs.question: How do I transfer money via IMPS?
faqs.answer: IMPS transfers are available 24x7 up to ₹5,00,000 per transaction via net banking or mobile app.

sections.name: Cards
sections.description: Debit and Credit card services and management

faqs.question: How do I block my debit card?
faqs.answer: Use Capital Bank app → Cards → Block Card instantly. You can also call 1800-123-4567 or SMS BLOCK<last 4 digits> to 567676.

faqs.question: How do I apply for a credit card?
faqs.answer: Apply online at capitalbank.com/cards or visit any branch. You need income proof, PAN, Aadhaar, and 3 months' bank statement.

faqs.question: What is the credit card billing cycle?
faqs.answer: The billing cycle is 30 days. Your statement is generated on the 1st of each month with a 20-day interest-free period.

faqs.question: How do I increase my credit card limit?
faqs.answer: Log in to net banking → Cards → Request Limit Enhancement. Approval depends on credit history and income.

faqs.question: How do I apply for a personal loan?
faqs.answer: Apply via Capital Bank app or website. You need salary slips (3 months), PAN, Aadhaar, and bank statements (6 months). Disbursal in 2-3 working days.

faqs.question: What is the home loan interest rate?
faqs.answer: Home loan interest rates start from 8.5% p.a. (floating). Rates vary based on loan amount, tenure, and credit score.

faqs.question: What is the EMI for a personal loan?
faqs.answer: EMI depends on loan amount, interest rate, and tenure. Use our EMI calculator at capitalbank.com/emi-calculator.

faqs.question: How to foreclose or prepay a loan?
faqs.answer: Visit the nearest branch or call 1800-123-4567. Foreclosure charges: 2% of outstanding principal after 6 EMIs.

faqs.question: What is the customer care number?
faqs.answer: Call 1800-123-4567 (24x7 toll-free) or 1800-425-0012. Email: support@capitalbank.com

faqs.question: How do I raise a complaint?
faqs.answer: Raise a complaint via: App → Help → Raise Ticket, or email grievance@capitalbank.com, or visit your nearest branch.

faqs.question: Where can I find the nearest branch or ATM?
faqs.answer: Use Capital Bank app → Branch/ATM Locator, or visit capitalbank.com/locator to find branches and ATMs near you.

faqs.question: What is the current FD interest rate?
faqs.answer: Capital Bank FD rates: 1 year – 6.75%, 2 years – 7.00%, 3-5 years – 7.25%. Senior citizens get 0.50% extra.

faqs.question: How to open a Fixed Deposit?
faqs.answer: Open FD via: Net banking → Deposits → Open FD, or Capital Bank app → Deposits → New FD. Minimum amount: ₹10,000.

faqs.question: What is a Recurring Deposit (RD)?
faqs.answer: RD allows monthly deposits starting from ₹500. Current RD interest rate: 6.50% p.a. for 12-24 month tenure.

sections.name: Digital Banking
sections.description: Mobile app, net banking, and security

faqs.question: How do I check my account balance?
faqs.answer: SMS: BAL<last 4 digits> to 567676. Or use Capital Bank mobile app, net banking, or missed call on 8800-123456.

faqs.question: How do I reset my net banking password?
faqs.answer: Go to capitalbank.com → Login → Forgot Password → Enter registered mobile/email → Verify OTP → Set new password.

faqs.question: Is Capital Bank app safe?
faqs.answer: Yes. The app uses 256-bit encryption, 2-factor authentication, and real-time fraud monitoring. Never share OTP or PIN with anyone.

faqs.question: How do I download the Capital Bank app?
faqs.answer: Search 'Capital Bank' on Google Play Store (Android) or Apple App Store (iOS). Download the official app verified by Capital Bank Ltd.

off_topic_response: I'm Capital Bank's AI assistant and can only help with banking-related queries such as accounts, loans, cards, UPI, FDs, and digital banking. For other topics, I'd recommend consulting the appropriate resources. Is there anything banking-related I can help you with? 😊
fallback_response: I don't have specific information on that. Please contact our customer care at **1800-123-4567** (24x7) or email **support@capitalbank.com**, or visit your nearest Capital Bank branch.
